chapter_title.en: Description of the Prayer From Its Beginning to Its End

parts.text: 936 - لِقَوْلِ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ اَلثَّانِي عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «لاَ بَأْسَ أَنْ يَتَكَلَّمَ اَلرَّجُلُ فِي

text: صَلاَةِ اَلْفَرِيضَةِ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ يُنَاجِي بِهِ رَبَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.936 - The saying of Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Jawad (as):
"There is no harm if a person speaks in the obligatory prayer with anything by which he converses with his Lord (azj), Mighty and Majestic."
